arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours today: Newcastle set Lloyd Kelly asking price, Andres Garcia to Aston Villa, Wilfried Zaha to MLS
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Newcastle United's Lloyd Kelly asking price, Andres Garcia to Aston Villa and Wilfried Zaha to the MLS.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: £96m midfielder to sign a new contract after holding talks with Arsenal and Man City recently
arts.sum: Jamal Musiala is ready to turn down the chance of a move back to England to stay with Bayern Munich, TBR Football can confirm. Bayern...

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres: Man Utd's key hope revealed in Arsenal transfer battle
arts.sum: Manchester United and Arsenal are key figures in the race to sign Sporting CP striker Viktor Gyokeres.

arts.ttl: Player accepts €4m annual salary to leave Aston Villa – Transfer on the way
arts.sum: According to a claim in the Turkish media, Fenerbahce are closing in on a deal for Aston Villa defender Diego Carlos. The Yellow Canaries have been linked with the Brazilian in recent weeks as Jose Mourinho makes it his priority to bolster his defensive options in this transfer window. arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes request to Bukayo Saka as he continues recovery from hamstring injury
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka, who was pictured while steadying himself on crutches, is not due back in action until March after suffering a hamstring injury and the absence of the Arsenal talisman remains keenly felt

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Aston Villa simulated to predict important Premier League clash
arts.sum: A huge 2-1 victory in the north London derby saw Arsenal not only complete the double over Tottenham but also close the gap on league leaders Liverpool, with the Gunners just four points behind the Reds following their 1-1 draw against Nottingham Forest. We predict that Arsenal could line up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their starting XI as follows: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Gabriel, Lewis-Skelly; Partey, Rice, Odegaard; Martinelli, Havertz, Trossard.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta tells Bukayo Saka to go on HOLIDAY as Arsenal star recovers from hamstring injury
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has pleaded with Bukayo Saka to take a rare holiday while he recovers from a hamstring injury, saying it could make him 'really better'.

arts.ttl: How to watch Arsenal vs Aston Villa: TV channel and live stream for Premier League game today
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta looking to get one over former Gunners boss Unai Emery

arts.ttl: Arsenal ready to snap up “spectacular” Norwegian with Haaland connection
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta’s Arsenal are not yet out of the Premier League title race, and they’re looking to land a contemporary of captain, Martin Odegaard. arts.ttl: Arsenal get fresh incentive to complete money-spinning Benjamin Sesko transfer NOW
arts.sum: The Gunners have a list of targets that they are monitoring heading into the summer transfer window, but their need for a proven goalscorer could speed things up
